headline: Assessing Pentair (PNR) Valuation After Recent Mixed Share Performance
summary: Recent performance snapshot for Pentair (PNR) Pentair (PNR) has recently seen mixed share performance, with a 1 day gain of 1.4% and a modest 0.7% rise over the past week, alongside a month return of 8% but a 15.1% decline over the past 3 months. Year to date, the stock shows a 13% decline, while the 1 year total return stands at 3%. Over 3 years and 5 years, total returns of 63.4% and 51.7% respectively highlight a longer term track record that investors may compare with recent moves. See...
